A smart platform that helps you discover nearby places, build social connections, and get AI-powered travel plans — all tailored to your locality.

Everything you need to explore smarter

One platform combining location discovery, AI intelligence, and social connectivity.

🗺️

Smart Discovery

Explore nearby parks, restaurants, clubs and more — filtered by category and distance.

🚗

Travel Modes

Get accurate travel times for car, bike, or walking to every location.

🤖

AI Travel Planner

Get personalized itineraries generated by AI based on your interests and preferences.

💡

Smart Matching

Connect with like-minded people in your locality using our compatibility algorithm.

💬

Real-Time Chat

Instantly connect and plan outings with your matches via built-in messaging.

🎯

Category Filters

Narrow down places by type so you always find exactly what you're looking for.

Get started in 3 simple steps

✍️
STEP 01

Create Account

Register and set up your profile with your interests and travel preferences.

🔍
STEP 02

Explore Nearby

Discover places around you filtered by category and your preferred travel mode.

🤝
STEP 03

Connect & Plan

Get matched with like-minded people and plan outings with AI-generated itineraries.

Ready to know your locality?

Join thousands discovering and connecting in their neighborhoods.

📍KnowYourLocality
